# This file is auto-generated by load-test.sh before vegeta runs.
# Do not edit the @path here manually — run the script from any working directory:
#
#   bash docs/loadtest/load-test.sh
#
# The script writes the correct absolute path to the @file reference so vegeta
# can locate run-request.json regardless of where the repo is checked out.
#
# Template (written by the script at runtime):
#   POST http://localhost:8080/run
#   Content-Type: application/json
#   @<absolute-path-to-run-request.json>
